channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Iran elects new supreme leader
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Mojtaba Khamenei has been chosen as Iran’s new supreme leader
- Mojtaba Khamenei: Son And Successor To Iran's Supreme Leader
- Khamenei’s son, Mojtaba, named new supreme leader
- Israel-Iran war updates: Mojtaba Khamenei to succeed his father as Iran's supreme leader; IRGC 'ready for complete obedience'
- Mojtaba Khamenei named Iran’s new supreme leader
- Who is Mojtaba Khamenei, Iran's new supreme leader?
- Iran names Khamenei's hardline son Mojtaba as new supreme leader, oil surges
- Iran names Mojtaba Khamenei as supreme leader to succeed late father Ayatollah Ali Khamenei
- Mojtaba Khamenei: son and successor to Iran's supreme leader
- Iran names Mojtaba Khamenei to succeed his slain father Ayatollah Ali as supreme leader

- Iran President: Mojtaba Khamenei appointment marks new era
- Iran’s Security Establishment Celebrates Mojtaba Khamenei’s Selection

- Explosion at US embassy in Oslo may have been deliberate attack, police say

- Explosion near US embassy in Oslo may be linked to Middle East events — police

- Police investigate a potential explosion outside the US Embassy in Oslo
- Explosion near US embassy in Oslo

- Explosion at US embassy in Oslo, no injuries

- Vital desalination plants in Iran and Bahrain are attacked.
